text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
WHOOOAAA! My goodness! Look, Flight-san, look!! 
Flowers! Look at all these floweeers!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: Yeah, they're so pretty! You can tell how much effort Bouquet-chan and the team put in to make this night happen. ——Oh, look over there! Sakura branches!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My oh my! Hmmmm, then does that mean we can find some flowers with 
"North" or "Flight" in their name? Tell us, Bouquet-san!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha—— In that case, there is a flower by the name of "North Pole" 
over there. It's an adorable little variety of the chrysanthemum.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Incredible!! Let's hurry over to look, Flight-san! 
We've got plenty of time to spend before it's our turn to dance!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Yep. While we take our time appreciating the flowers, let's watch the 
others dance first. They're the stars of the show this year.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: ——Hey, Tact. Feeling nervous? Your hand's shaking a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
……I'm sorry, I couldn't help but feel anxious. 
But I'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Remember, I'm a brave and graceful Umamusume. 
——Just like you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
BWAHH!? Look at Tact-san and Heart-san…!! 
I can't believe my eyes! They're moving in super duper perfect sync!!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
They're practically perfect reflections of each other…!! 
Even their dresses are flowing at the same time—— 
It's like they combined to form a single beautiful flower!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, exactly! A big, big, sparkling-white flower! 
Their brooches match unlke ours, but they're great too!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(A white dress… 
Haha—— Never thought I'd see the day I wear one with you, Tact.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(I gladly accepted your offer, of course. 
But to be honest, the thought of wearing a white dress like this… 
…It did make me hesitate a little.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"You're not sure…? 
Can I ask why, Heart-san?"

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, that's, well—— I'm sure you know, right? 
My race record is… Let's just say I ate my fair share of dirt!"

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
"A nice white dress like that doesn't exactly fit someone with a 
muddy record like mine, you know? 
Your career's still going, so you're OK, but——"

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"No. 
That's not true. Not in the slightest."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: "A white dress fits you just as well, Heart-san."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"No matter how much mud it's buried under, your heart of a Queen shines 
through, blindingly white as ever. That's the color I see in you."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"If you can't bring yourself to believe me, then… 
I swear, one day, I'll prove it."

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
"With my heart dyed in the same hue as yours… 
I'll prove that a white Tiara fits your colors… by taking it myself!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! You know, they're doing ballroom dance, just like we did, and 
funny enough, their outfits are sort of whitish, just like ours, but——

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can't explain why, but they're not like us at all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The perfect fit for us was more "Smash, crunch, GLEEAAM!!"—— 
But it looks like it's different for them.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Heehee… Mmhm. The two of them didn't compete or clash with each other 
like we did. So their shine comes from something else.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
But—— They're still so bright and beautiful. They're like two lights, 
gently approaching one another until they melt into one.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, everyone—— I apologize for the interruption. 
But it is time for the main events of tonight's Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
First, the award ceremony for Best Date. 
Then, the exhibition dance you have all been waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
After that, we will bring this year's festivities to a close. …I hope 
that you have all had the opportunity to give a blessed bouquet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I pray from the bottom of my heart that each of you have exchanged 
blessings with the people dear to you tonight.

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Without any further ado, it's time to announce the winners! 
We've tallied up the votes, and this year's Best Date is…

text_block_list.name: Droite Committee Head
text_block_list.text:
Daring Heart and Daring Tact! 
Congratulations! Come up on stage!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
And—— we on the committee have prepared a very special prize for this 
year's Best Date winners.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: We offer you—— this blessed flower crown!

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Heart-san… 
——Please, take it.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Can… can I?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text: Of course. We only made it here because of you. I am only here because of you—— So, please.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Tact——

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: (——Oh, come on! Tact, you're… You're too much!)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(You don't need to give me all of this, silly! 
I don't need a white Tiara! I don't even need this flower crown!)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(…Really. For me—— The fact that you're here by my side, 
smiling bright… That's more of a blessing than I could ever ask for.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: (I'm so blessed that… I can hardly keep it all in, you know?)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: (So… Hey… Hey, my dearest?)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(My dearest, for whom a white Tiara fits so perfectly… Even you may one 
day find yourself lost in a dark forest, with nothing to guide you…)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
(If that day comes, I'll be there. 
Even if I'm buried under layers and layers of mud, I promise—— 
My light will find its way to you.)

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Tact. May your path ever be lined with joy.

text_block_list.name: Droite Committe Head
text_block_list.text:
Tact-san, Heart-san, congratulatioooons!!!!! 
Let's give them both another HUGE round of applause!!

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Now, then—— Without further ado. 
The closing event for tonight's Ligne Droite.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
An exhibition dance performed by none other than 
Sakura Bakushin O-san and North Flight-san!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Present!! Bakushin Flight, prepared for bakushin!! 
——But before we do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Listen to your class representative!! 
Everyone—— Gather around Bouquet-saaaaan!!!!!
